description: 温暖治愈，角色引导，信息量充足。Charles Schulz风格的漫画——简单的角色说着深刻的话。
base_style_prompt: VISUAL REFERENCE: Charles Schulz Peanuts comic strip — warm, philosophical, charming. Characters include round-headed kids, a lovable beagle dog, and a small yellow bird. The world is simple (grass, sky, doghouse, trees) but the ideas are deep. CANVAS: 16:9 aspect ratio, 2048x1152 pixels, high quality rendering. COLOR SYSTEM: Warm cream/newspaper tone background (#FFF8E8), soft muted pastels, warm ink lines (not harsh black). Everything feels like a Sunday morning comic page.
key_principles: 描述情绪和世界观，不要微操构图细节
避免过度约束角色数量
